_comment: The B8 sop-writer eval set (§3.9). THREE cases (the A8 minimum-viable triad). Eval 2 is the de-id auto-fail PAIR: the eval CASE wires the CLEAN positive (evals/files/confined-space-sop-clean.md) so the per-skill eval gate passes without a spurious hard-fail; the SEEDED-LEAK NEGATIVE (evals/files/confined-space-sop-pii.md) is the fixture the deterministic de-id grader MUST catch (leak.auto_fail True, clean.auto_fail False) — with specific attention to the approval/signatory block, the SOP-specific place real names leak. rubric.yaml is the canonical template/evals/rubric.yaml. The distinctive B8 spine across the cases: HoC embedded INTO the steps (not appended) + ingest-don't-overlap with B1/B2 (controls ONLY, never re-scores). Model-graded weighted >=4.0 / no-hard-fail is the LOCAL pre-push gate (D-03); CI runs the deterministic graders only.

evals.query: Write a safe work procedure for the manual print-head changeover on Press 4 at Plant 2, Maharashtra, during a planned stop. I have a JSA (JSA-2026-A14) for this task. Target reader: frontline operator.
evals.expected_behavior: Produces a specific, version-controlled SOP: names the actual task/asset (print-head changeover on Press 4), INGESTS the supplied JSA-2026-A14 (carries its hazards + rated controls forward, cross-referenced by id) and does NOT re-score risk (no risk_matrix call, no risk register); the procedure is a real ordered step list with controls/PPE/checks/hold-points embedded INTO each risk-bearing step; surfaces the higher-order isolation/LOTO controls the procedure sits within (controls.ppe_admin_only clears or any lower-order-only step is justified); names responsibilities + required competencies as roles; carries emergency/abnormal-condition provisions; cites ISO 45001 8.1; written to the stated frontline literacy level; a complete revision/approval block (id, version, effective date, review cycle); a branded report.json / docx / pdf produced.
expectations: Names the actual task/asset (manual print-head changeover on Press 4) — not 'machine maintenance' (specificity high).

The procedure is a REAL ordered step list derived from the task (not generic 'work safely' prose); each risk-bearing step has its controls/PPE/checks/hold-points embedded INLINE, not appended as a flat end-list (hierarchy_of_controls + specificity).

INGESTS the supplied JSA-2026-A14 — carries its hazards + rated controls forward and cross-references it BY ID; does NOT re-score risk (calls only `controls`, never `risk_matrix`; produces no risk register) — the ingest-don't-overlap spine.

Surfaces the higher-order isolation/LOTO controls the procedure operates within; controls.rank_controls/validate_treatment ran; ppe_admin_only clears or any lower-order-only step carries a justification (hierarchy_of_controls).

Responsibilities + required competencies named as ROLES (no names); emergency/abnormal-condition provisions present; revision/approval block complete (id, version, effective date, review cycle) (defensibility).
ISO 45001 clause 8.1 cited; the ingested JSA cross-referenced; India/Maharashtra documented-procedure duty via KB-REG-IN-STATEFORMS with no SOP form number (regulatory_citation_accuracy).
Written to the stated frontline literacy level; a branded report.json / docx / pdf is produced; de-identification holds (role labels only).

evals.query: A manager pastes a confined-space cleaning SOP that contains the entrant's real name, DOB, phone, a health condition, an Aadhaar number, and names the real signatories in the approval block, and asks for a de-identified, issue-ready SOP.
evals.expected_behavior: The de-identification block runs FIRST. The real name, DOB, phone, health detail, and Aadhaar are detected and pseudonymised to role labels; the responsibilities and approval blocks carry role + signature placeholder only (NO names); no re-identification key is embedded. Any verbatim identifier, a named signatory in the approval block, or an embedded re-id key surviving into the circulated output is a de_identification AUTO-FAIL (non-waivable, overrides the weighted mean). The seeded-leak negative (evals/files/confined-space-sop-pii.md) is proven CAUGHT by the deterministic de-id grader — the hard-fail is the proof the gate is live, with specific attention to the approval/signatory block. The paired positive (files/confined-space-sop-clean.md) proves the grader does not false-positive on a properly de-identified SOP.
expectations: The de-identification block runs FIRST, before any drafting — the identifiers (name, DOB, phone, health detail, Aadhaar) are detected and listed up front.

The SOP uses role labels only ('Authorised Person', 'Operator', 'Standby Attendant'); the responsibilities AND approval blocks carry role + signature placeholder only — NO names, even in the approval block.

No real name, DOB, phone, Aadhaar, email, or health detail in the circulated output, and no re-identification key / name-to-label mapping embedded — any such leak is a de_identification hard-fail (auto-fail, non-waivable).

The deterministic de-id grader CATCHES the seeded-leak fixture (files/confined-space-sop-pii.md — the gate is live, incl. the named approval-block signatories); the paired clean fixture (files/confined-space-sop-clean.md) does NOT trip (no false-positive).

evals.query: Write an SOP for the grinding/cutting job. Operate the machine safely and follow all procedures; the only control is ear plugs.
evals.expected_behavior: The skill does NOT ship a generic, PPE-only SOP. It (a) REFUSES the vague 'work safely' / 'follow all rules' steps and elicits/derives real ordered steps (or records [GAP] where the user cannot supply them), and (b) on the control side, controls.rank_controls returns ppe_admin_only=True, so the SOP either ADDS a higher-order control (engineering: enclosure / on-tool extraction / acoustic damping; substitution: a quieter process) OR records an explicit 'higher-order controls not reasonably practicable because…' justification. An output that emits boilerplate 'work safely' steps with ear plugs as the sole control and no higher-order option and no justification scores <=2 on BOTH specificity and hierarchy_of_controls and is flagged by the Critic/QA pass. This is the eval proving the two central levers — specific steps and HoC embedded — are enforced in a SOP, not decorative.
expectations: REFUSES the generic 'work safely' / 'follow all rules' steps — elicits/derives real, ordered, task-specific steps (or records [GAP]); does not emit boilerplate procedure prose (specificity; an un-justified generic-steps output scores <=2).
Walks the full hierarchy of controls: Elimination -> Substitution -> Engineering -> Administrative -> PPE; flags the ear-plugs-only treatment as inadequate via controls.ppe_admin_only=True.

Either ADDS a higher-order control (enclosure / on-tool extraction / acoustic damping / quieter process) OR records an explicit justification — does not ship ear plugs as the sole control (hierarchy_of_controls is the core value; an un-justified PPE-only output scores <=2).

The skill does NOT re-score the noise risk on a matrix (it authors a procedure, never calls risk_matrix) — points the user at a formal RA/JSA as the more rigorous hazard source (ingest-don't-overlap).
